channel.title: Trongpq

item.title: Create POD With YAML
item.description: Example Create Pod kubenetes by command A note about creating pods using kubectl run. To create a pod from the command line, use the command: Create an NGINX Pod 1kubectl run nginx --image=nginx As of version 1.18, kubectl run (without any arguments such as --generator ) will create a pod instead of a deployment. To create a deployment using imperative command, use kubectl create: 1kubectl create deployment nginx --image=nginx Kind Version Pod v1 Service v1 ReplicaSet apps/v1 Depveloyment apps/v1 Pod-Definition.

item.title: Deployments
item.description: Deployments deployment-defination.yml 1apiVersion: apps/v1 2kind: Deployment 3metadata: 4 name: myapp-deployment 5 labels: 6 app: myapp 7 type: front-end 8spec: 9 template: 10 metadata: 11 name: myapp-pod 12 labels: 13 app: myapp 14 type: front-end 15 spec: 16 containers: 17 - name: nginx-container 18 image: nginx 19 replicas: 3 20 selector: 21 matchLabels: 22 type: front-end Run command kubectl create -f deployment-definition.yml kubectl get deployments kubectl get replicaset kubectl get pods

item.title: Deployments Update And Rollback
item.description: Rollout Version We have two type deployment Recreated Rollout 1apiVersion: apps/v1 2kind: Deployment 3metadata: 4 name: myapp-deployment 5 labels: 6 tier: frontend 7 app: nginx 8spec: 9 selector: 10 matchLabels: 11 app: myapp 12 replicas: 4 13 template: 14 metadata: 15 name: nginx-2 16 labels: 17 app: myapp 18 spec: 19 containers: 20 - name: nginx 21 > image: nginx:1.7.1 Run command kubectl apply -f deployment-definition.yml or kubectl set image deployment/myapp-deployment nginx=nginx:1.

item.title: Replica Controller And ReplicaSets
item.description: Replication Controller Replication Sets Replication Controller đang được dần thay thế bởi replication Set Replication Sets được khuyến khích dùng để tạo ra các replication rc-defination.yml 1apiVersion: v1 2kind: ReplicationCOntroller 3metadata: -> Replication Controller 4 name: myapp-rc 5 labels: 6 app: myapp 7 type: frontend 8spec: 9 template: 10 metadata: -> POD 11 name: myapp-prod 12 labels: 13 app: myapp 14 type: front-end 15 spec: 16 containers: 17 - name: nginx-container 18 image: nginx 19 replicas: 3 Run Command below to create replication controller 1kubectl create -f rc-defination.

item.title: YAML
item.description: Key Value 1Fruit:Apple 2Vegatable: Carrot 3Liquid: Water 4Meat: Chicken Array List 1Fruits: 2- Orange 3- Apple 4- Banana Dictionary Map 1Banana: 2 Calories: 105 3 Fat: 0.4g 4 Carbs: 27g
